title: Odoo Community
author: Didact Group
description: A comprehensive open source ERP and CRM platform.
changelog: Initial release on the Cloudron Community App Store.
postInstallMessage:
Default login: admin / changeme. Please change the admin password after first login via Settings > Users.

Custom Addons: Upload modules to /app/data/addons/ via SFTP (port 222) or File Manager, then restart the app.

Database Restore: Upload a pg_dump file to /app/data/restore/database.dump and optionally a filestore/ directory, then restart the app.
